nodes.name: Software Release Integrity
nodes.summary: Parent program for review units that inspect how software releases are built, signed, documented, and monitored.
scope_notes: Use child control nodes for evidence work.
Do not publish claims about a project unless a source-backed finding supports that control.

nodes.name: Release Provenance Control
nodes.summary: Assesses whether a release has inspectable provenance, build metadata, attestations, or reproducibility evidence.
scope_notes: Claims must name the reviewed release or repository boundary.
A signed artifact alone does not prove the build process was secure.

nodes.name: Dependency Exposure Control
nodes.summary: Assesses source-backed evidence about direct dependency inventory, vulnerability exposure, and update posture.
scope_notes: Separate observed dependency inventory from risk interpretation.
Do not imply exploitability without source-backed context.

nodes.name: Maintenance Signal Control
nodes.summary: Assesses evidence about update cadence, ownership signals, issue response, and operational maintenance context.
scope_notes: Activity signals are not direct evidence of code quality.
Maintenance claims must stay bounded to the observed window.
